items.title: Women's coach given lifetime ban for secret filming
items.summary: Czech coach Petr Vlachovsky, who secretly filmed female football players in changing rooms and showers, is handed a lifetime ban by Uefa.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Last Night in Baseball: Unreal Ending To Athletics-Angels
items.summary: The Angels walked off a once-no-hit bid, the Mets scored 11 runs in extras, Michael King shut out the Dodgers, the Marlins pummeled the Braves and more from Monday's MLB action.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Tempers flare between Litton and Rizwan in Sylhet
items.summary: Bangladesh's fielders got stuck into the Pakistan batter during the chase on the fourth day in Sylhet
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
